_comment: Frozen eval baseline for the doc-drift mutation tests ONLY. The LIVE eval writes data/eval-latest.json (gitignored, regenerated by `helicon eval`); that file is absent on a fresh clone, which is why the tests copy THIS committed fixture instead. Keep the four graded fields below in sync with a real eval run when the public docs' numbers change: precision_at_3, mrr, query_count, decay_predicts_human_kills_auc.

efficient_storage_retrieval.disclosure: small internal benchmark, one label per query
